overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along the Kamassa River during a stormy dusk. The character briefly enters the water as the camera glides over the river surface before returning to the forested riverbank path under a dramatic purple storm sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy riverbank trail beside Kamassa River

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path with the river to the right, wearing a long dark coat and cowboy hat

entered.detail: wide river with reflective water surface flowing alongside the path
narrow dirt trail running parallel to the river through tall grass
mature oak trees with dense canopies lining the inland side of the path
dark gray storm clouds covering the sky with patches of lighter clouds

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a grassy riverbank trail beside the Kamassa River under an overcast stormy sky. The dirt path winds through scattered oak trees with the wide river visible to the right, reflecting the gray clouds above.

events.description: character steps off the grassy bank and wades into the river water, camera follows into the water

agents.ego_description: wading into the river from the grassy bank, water level rising to cover the character until they disappear below the surface

entered.detail: rippling water surface with reflections of the stormy sky

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the dirt path and enters the river water, causing the camera to descend to water level. The grassy bank and path recede as the view transitions to the open water surface with the distant forest shore visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open water surface of Kamassa River

agents.ego_description: camera moves smoothly over the water surface, character temporarily not visible, focusing on the distant shoreline and storm clouds

entered.detail: dense tree line on the opposite bank silhouetted against the stormy sky

segments.scene_description: The camera glides low over the river water surface, moving steadily toward the distant forested shore. The character is not visible during this sequence, with the view dominated by the rippling water and dark storm clouds overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested riverbank path under purple storm sky

events.description: character reappears on the riverbank path as the sky shifts to dramatic purple and pink storm hues
ambient light drops significantly as storm clouds darken to deep purple, with moonlight breaking through

agents.ego_description: walking along the forest path with the river visible to the right, silhouetted against the dramatic purple storm sky with the moon occasionally visible through clouds

entered.detail: dramatic sky filled with dark purple and pink storm clouds with breaks showing lighter sky

segments.scene_description: The character reappears walking along the dirt path through a more forested section of the riverbank. The sky has shifted to dramatic purple and pink storm hues as dusk deepens into night, with the moon occasionally visible through breaks in the dark clouds. The river remains visible to the right while tall trees line the left side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a riverbank that transitions from a gray, overcast afternoon into a dramatic, purple-hued storm at dusk. It begins with a character walking a winding dirt path through scattered oak trees beside the wide, reflective waters of the Kamassa River. As the character leaves the trail and enters the river, the camera descends to water level, gliding low across the rippling surface toward a distant forested shore while the character disappears from view. The scene then shifts back to the riverbank as the character reappears on the path, where the environment becomes more densely forested and the sky transforms into deep pink and purple tones. Finally, the camera tracks the character through the deepening night, with the moon occasionally breaking through dark clouds above the river.
